receipt_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of canonical receipt fields (workflow \x00 step_id \x00 verdict \x00 state \x00 message). Optional for backward compat with pre-Gap2 ledgers; required when --strict-sha is passed to hle verify.

source_sha256.description: Legacy alias retained for pre-split receipt readers; use framework_sha256 and manifest_sha256 for new scaffold receipts.
